race.comment: DAME FLORENCE (13) was well in commission last start over 1500m at Caulfield Heath when fourth, beaten 4 lengths. Will find this easier and boasts a fitness edge over some of the key dangers. KING MAYWIN (6) is a maiden galloper who hasn't raced since finishing 3 lengths back in fourth over 1530m at this track five-and-a-half months ago. Trialling well leading into this. Expect a bold showing. ON THE LOOSE (8) came home strongly last start to finish second, beaten 0.8 lengths, over 1200m at Ballarat. Should park just off the speed. Deserves respect on best figures. TESTY NIC (10) will be much better for the three runs in the debut campaign, when not disgraced in any, so he can feature from a good draw.
